§ 64 innehåller sekretessbelagda uppgifter och förvaras hos socialförvaltningen. Ärendet redovisas inte mer än genom rubrik i innehållsförteckningen i offentligt pro- tokoll.
tldr: The meeting concerns a response to an appeal related to the "LVM" law, which is a law regarding the care of young people who are at risk of harm. Because the case involves sensitive personal information, the details are confidential.
lattlast:
The working committee of the social services board in Nora municipality held a meeting on June 16, 2026. The main topic of discussion was a response to an appeal regarding the "Law on Care and Protection of Young People at Risk" (LVM). LVM is a law that governs when a municipality takes responsibility for children who are in danger.

Because the case contains information that is confidential, the details cannot be disclosed to the public. Confidentiality means that the information is secret in order to protect the individuals involved. For this reason, the specific details are not included in this document.

All information regarding this decision is securely stored within the social services department, which is the part of the municipality responsible for social support and care. Only the title of the case is visible in this public record.
